en: Tragically, this is based on your life. I mean, these are things that happened.
ko: 슬프게도 이건 당신의 실제 이야기에서 따온 거잖아요. 실제로 있었던 일이에요.

en: No, but things like the washing machine, that happened to you. What?
ko: 아니, 하지만 세탁기 같은 건 실제로 당신한테 일어난 일이잖아. 뭐라고?

en: The washing. You were very hungover.
Tell Jodie Foster that story. All those stories are really cool though.
ko: 조디 포스터한테 그 이야기 해줘봐. 그 이야기들 다 진짜 재밌긴 하지.

en: Graeme, when I was teaching, which is what this show is based on,
ko: 그레이엄, 내가 교사로 일할 때, 이 쇼가 바로 그때 이야기를 바탕으로 한 건데,

en: I went home one weekend and I was in my thirties.
ko: 어느 주말에 집에 갔었어. 그때 나는 30대였고.

en: I was probably 33 years of age. I went home to see my mother,
ko: 아마 33살이었을 거야. 어머니를 만나러 집에 갔었는데,

en: and while I was at home, my mother did my washing for me.
ko: 집에 있는 동안 어머니가 빨래를 해주셨어.

en: Because I was only 33. Then I went back,
and on the Sunday night, I got really drunk.
Then I went for a curry.
And then the next day, I went into school.
I went into school, and it was a school in Slough.
It was quite a rough school.
